function: () => { const mc = document.querySelector('.modal-card'); const mr = mc ? mc.getBoundingClientRect() : null; return { cardRect: mr ? { x: mr.x, y: mr.y, w: mr.width, h: mr.height } : null, cardStyle: mc ? { maxHeight: getComputedStyle(mc).maxHeight, overflow: getComputedStyle(mc).overflow, padding: getComputedStyle(mc).padding } : null, scrollTop: mc ? mc.scrollTop : null, scrollHeight: mc ? mc.scrollHeight : null, clientHeight: mc ? mc.clientHeight : null }; }
